prestazioni: Forced induction conversion for the **2.0L 8GR-FKS** (300-350hp stock) using a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate**, paired with a **GReddy intercooler kit (Crown-specific core)** and **HKS Hi-Power SP exhaust (S220-specific cat-back)**. Supporting mods include **Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors**, **Walbro 450LPH fuel pump**, and a **Link G4X Storm ECU** with custom ethanol mapping for E30-E50 blends.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (S220-specific valving)**, **SuperPro poly bushings (front/rear control arms, subframe)**, and **Cusco 22mm front / 18mm rear sway bars**. Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm rotors) / 4-piston rear (345mm rotors)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (8.25" ring gear, Crown-specific)** in the **A960E 8-speed auto transmission**, paired with a **PRL Motorsports torque converter (2,800rpm stall)** and **Toyota Racing Development (TRD) transmission cooler**. Engine internals include **Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **BC 264° camshafts (intake/exhaust)**, and a **Tomei Type-S oil pump** for high-RPM reliability.
estetica: Widebody conversion using the **Liberty Walk LB-S220 kit (OEM+ fitment, no fender cutting)** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders (dry carbon, 2x2 twill weave)** and **Rocket Bunny S220-specific side skirts**. Front bumper replaced with the **Seibon Carbon S220 GT-style lip (pre-preg carbon)** and **custom 3D-printed canards (ABS, matte black)** for aero balance.

Wheel setup: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x9.5 +22 front / 19x10.5 +30 rear)** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)**. Brake calipers painted **GReddy Racing Blue** with **custom laser-etched Toyota Gazoo Racing (TGR) logos** on the caliper bodies. Window tint: **3M Crystalline 70% (front) / 20% (rear)** with **ceramic coating (Gyeon Quartz)** for hydrophobic properties.

Interior: **Recaro SP-G (JDM-spec, Alcantara/leather)** with **Sabelt 6-point harnesses (bolt-in, Crown-specific mounting brackets)**. Steering wheel replaced with a **NRG Innovations 350mm deep-dish (suede, red stitching)** and **custom gauge cluster overlay (Defi Advance BF, 100mm, oil temp/boost/fuel pressure)**. Shift knob: **TRD titanium (8-speed auto, weighted)** with **custom engraved shift pattern (Crown emblem)**.
